description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages code_standarts, test, and release using the onegreyonewhite/tox:tox Docker image (and onegreyonewhite/tox:centos6 for the publish job). Add a code_style job in the code_standarts stage that retries twice, runs `tox -e flake`, and runs only on branches matching the regex ^.{0,}issue_.*$, on the developer branch, or on master. Add a publish_pypi job in the release stage that uses the centos6 image, runs `tox -e build` then `twine upload -u ${PYPI_UPLOAD_NAME} -p ${PYPI_UPLOAD_PASSWORD} dist/*.tar.gz dist/*.whl`, and runs only on tags. Add four test jobs (py36-coverage-ansible25, py36-install-ansible26, py36-install-ansible27, py37-install-ansible29) in the test stage that retry twice, are excluded for GUI and tags, set TOX_ENVS to $CI_BUILD_NAME, and execute `tox -e $TOX_ENVS`. Finally, add a release job in the release stage that runs a before_script to rewrite the git remote using GIT_ACCESS_USER and GIT_ACCESS_PASSWORD, then runs `bash autorelease.sh`, and runs only on the master branch when those variables are defined.
